item.quote: This text has been updated and should show at 150pt.
item.name: Jason Sass

item.quote: This one should show up at 100pt. And I want to see that it'll hold consistent, no matter how much text I add to it…it, just needs to look good on it's own.
item.attribution: - Devin Tucker / 2.08.25 / Trail Blazers vs Lakers
item.name: Devin Tucker

item.quote: This one is showing 100pt. I believe this is a decent size for quotes that will word-wrap muliple lines. But I need to be extra cautions that I allow for enough space that the uswer can type mutiple things and not have anything get cut off or cover the quote attribute.
item.name: Matthew Gardner
